{
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "xaoSujEWCHM3"
      },
      "source": [
        "# PCA from Scratch (Eigen Decomposition)\n",
        "\n",
        "Here we show the implementation of PCA (principal component analysis) via eigen decomposition of covariance matrix. Other implementations also exist, e.g. via SVD (singular value decomposition)."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "pFSNKtf6CHM5"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "import random\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "import matplotlib as mpl\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "cmap = plt.get_cmap('tab10')\n",
        "colors = [cmap(i) for i in range(cmap.N)]\n",
        "\n",
        "mpl.rcParams[\"font.size\"] = 24\n",
        "mpl.rcParams[\"lines.linewidth\"] = 2\n",
        "\n",
        "seed = 0\n",
        "random.seed(seed)\n",
        "np.random.seed(seed)\n",
        "n_samples = 100\n",
        "markersize = 100"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "0JUYfmZxCHM5"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Sample 100 data points"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 2,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "SUYC9RqpCHM6"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# sample some data with noise\n",
        "x = np.linspace(-2, 2, n_samples)\n",
        "y = x\n",
        "y_noised = y + np.random.randn(n_samples)*0.5\n",
        "\n",
        "samples = np.hstack([x.reshape(-1, 1), y_noised.reshape(-1, 1)])"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 3,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 536
        },
        "id": "sXTG8W4LCHM6",
        "outputId": "43753df0-9d4f-4df0-e889-ce1e6ac30fcd"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "execute_result",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(np.float64(-2.2),\n",
              " np.float64(2.2),\n",
              " np.float64(-2.7324411631352845),\n",
              " np.float64(3.076154229443891))"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "execution_count": 3
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 500x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(5, 5))\n",
        "plt.scatter(samples[:, 0], samples[:, 1], c=\"blue\", alpha=0.5)\n",
        "plt.plot(x, y, \"r-\")\n",
        "# plt.axis(\"off\")\n",
        "plt.axis(\"equal\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "R2sVF0Z_CHM6"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Eigen Decomposition of Covariance Matrix"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 4,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Chv2yZKICHM6"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# remove mean from samples\n",
        "demeaned = True\n",
        "# define number of components\n",
        "ncomponents = 2\n",
        "\n",
        "data = samples\n",
        "\n",
        "if demeaned:\n",
        "    avg = np.mean(data, axis=0)\n",
        "    data = data - avg\n",
        "\n",
        "# compute covariance matrix\n",
        "cov = data.T@data # (2xn) x (nx2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# eigen decomposition of covariance matrix\n",
        "eigenvalues, eigenvectors = np.linalg.eig(cov)\n",
        "# sort eigenvectors by eigenvalues, making sure the first PCs always capture more variance\n",
        "sorted_indices = np.argsort(eigenvalues)[::-1]\n",
        "eigval = eigenvalues[sorted_indices]\n",
        "eigvec = eigenvectors[:, sorted_indices]\n",
        "\n",
        "# the PCs we want\n",
        "pcs = eigvec[:, :ncomponents]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 5,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "g6PEvQ7BCHM6",
        "outputId": "316f5346-a595-4452-f1fe-23c9ca5abcb5"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "execute_result",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "array([274.86336587,  12.47505606])"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "execution_count": 5
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "eigval"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 6,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "KWZq0CenCHM6",
        "outputId": "53afac95-e169-4069-bf17-ffa977d7fb3b"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "execute_result",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "array([[-0.68620272, -0.72741035],\n",
              "       [-0.72741035,  0.68620272]])"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "execution_count": 6
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "eigvec"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "sD_1xr49CHM7"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Plot PCs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 7,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 536
        },
        "id": "Y9KgJc_qCHM7",
        "outputId": "da3ec154-ded9-4cda-e84d-994132c2a44a"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "execute_result",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(np.float64(-2.2),\n",
              " np.float64(2.1999999999999997),\n",
              " np.float64(-2.762345170902527),\n",
              " np.float64(3.0462502216766483))"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "execution_count": 7
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 500x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "fig = plt.figure(figsize=(5, 5))\n",
        "plt.scatter(data[:, 0], data[:, 1], c=\"blue\", alpha=0.5, label=\"Original\")\n",
        "\n",
        "for i in range(pcs.shape[1]):\n",
        "    plt.quiver(*(0, 0), *(pcs[:, i]),\n",
        "               scale=1, scale_units=\"xy\", angles=\"xy\", \\\n",
        "               color=colors[i], label=f\"PC{i+1}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.legend(loc=(1.05, 0))\n",
        "# plt.axis(\"off\")\n",
        "plt.axis(\"equal\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "My8LkGrdCHM7"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Plot reconstructed data on each PC"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 8,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 592
        },
        "id": "_qrMJJJkCHM7",
        "outputId": "bbea8d5f-3ec7-4ae8-830b-8573822812b1"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stderr",
          "text": [
            "/tmp/ipython-input-8-3762288799.py:8: UserWarning: *c* argument looks like a single numeric RGB or RGBA sequence, which should be avoided as value-mapping will have precedence in case its length matches with *x* & *y*.  Please use the *color* keyword-argument or provide a 2D array with a single row if you intend to specify the same RGB or RGBA value for all points.\n",
            "  plt.scatter(reconstruct[:, 0], reconstruct[:, 1], \\\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "execute_result",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(np.float64(-2.2176850329290465),\n",
              " np.float64(2.507215501709723),\n",
              " np.float64(-2.762345170902527),\n",
              " np.float64(3.0462502216766483))"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "execution_count": 8
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 500x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "fig = plt.figure(figsize=(5, 5))\n",
        "plt.scatter(data[:, 0], data[:, 1],\n",
        "            c=\"blue\", alpha=0.5, label=\"Original\")\n",
        "for i in range(pcs.shape[1]):\n",
        "    pc = eigvec[:, i].reshape((-1, 1))\n",
        "    reconstruct = data@pc@pc.T\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.scatter(reconstruct[:, 0], reconstruct[:, 1], \\\n",
        "        c=colors[i], alpha=0.5, label=f\"Reconstructed on PC{i+1}\")\n",
        "    plt.legend(loc=(1.05, 0))\n",
        "# plt.axis(\"off\")\n",
        "plt.axis(\"equal\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "wTNJppU8CHM7"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Plot projection of one datapoint on PC1"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 9,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 536
        },
        "id": "U_uSXSlrCHM7",
        "outputId": "8248df66-0a4c-4697-cc93-6e5b78494869"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "execute_result",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "(np.float64(-2.2),\n",
              " np.float64(2.1999999999999997),\n",
              " np.float64(-2.762345170902527),\n",
              " np.float64(3.0462502216766483))"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "execution_count": 9
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 500x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "i = 0 # PC1\n",
        "k = 85 # a good datapoint\n",
        "\n",
        "fig = plt.figure(figsize=(5, 5))\n",
        "plt.scatter(data[:, 0], data[:, 1],\n",
        "            c=\"blue\", alpha=0.5, label=\"Original\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.quiver(*(0, 0), *(pcs[:, i]),\n",
        "            scale=1, scale_units=\"xy\", angles=\"xy\", \\\n",
        "            color=\"r\", label=f\"PC{i+1}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "pc = eigvec[:, i].reshape((-1, 1))\n",
        "reconstruct = data@pc@pc.T\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.quiver(0, 0, reconstruct[k, 0], reconstruct[k, 1], \\\n",
        "    scale=1, scale_units=\"xy\", angles=\"xy\", \\\n",
        "    color=colors[i], label=f\"Projection on PC{i+1}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.quiver(0, 0, data[k, 0], data[k, 1], \\\n",
        "    scale=1, scale_units=\"xy\", angles=\"xy\", \\\n",
        "    color=\"k\", label=f\"One point\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.quiver(reconstruct[k, 0], reconstruct[k, 1], # start point\n",
        "           data[k, 0]-reconstruct[k, 0], data[k, 1]-reconstruct[k, 1], # vector\n",
        "            scale=1, scale_units=\"xy\", angles=\"xy\", \\\n",
        "            color=\"green\", label=f\"Reconstruction Error\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.legend(loc=(1.05, 0))\n",
        "# plt.axis(\"off\")\n",
        "plt.axis(\"equal\")"
      ]
    }
  ],
